title: Kolte-Patil Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kolte-Patil Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Kolte-Patil Developers has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
